'hibernate.transaction.jta.platform' to enable JTA platform integration) Hibernate: drop table if exists achievements cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists courses cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists tasks cascade Hibernate: drop table if exists users cascade Hibernate: create table achievements (earned_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, badge_type varchar(255) not null check (badge_type in ('FIRST_TASK','WEEK_STREAK','COURSE_COMPLETE','EARLY_BIRD','CENTURY','PERFECT_WEEK')), description TEXT, primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table courses (credits integer, color varchar(7), created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, user_id bigint not null, instructor varchar(200), name varchar(200) not null, category varchar(255) not null check (category in ('MANDATORY','ELECTIVE','EXTRA')), description TEXT, status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('ACTIVE','COMPLETED','FROZEN')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table tasks (due_date date, recurring boolean, course_id bigint, created_at timestamp(6), id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), user_id bigint not null, recurrence_pattern varchar(50), title varchar(300) not null, description TEXT, priority varchar(255) not null check (priority in ('LOW','MEDIUM','HIGH','CRITICAL')), status varchar(255) not null check (status in ('TODO','IN_PROGRESS','DONE')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: create table users (created_at timestamp(6) not null, id bigint generated by default as identity, updated_at timestamp(6), first_name varchar(100) not null, last_name varchar(100) not null, avatar_url varchar(512), email varchar(255) not null unique, password_hash varchar(255) not null, role varchar(255) not null check (role in ('STUDENT','ADMIN')), primary key (id)) Hibernate: alter table if exists achievements add constraint FK1efgavvlxwajrr25mqpl34m1n foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists courses add constraint FK51k53m6m5gi9n91fnlxkxgpmv foreign key (user_id) references users Hibernate: alter table if exists tasks add constraint FKopldg47bgaarlampi2f6wees3 foreign key (course_id) references courses Hibernate: alter table if exists tasks add constraint FK6s1ob9k4ihi75xbxe2w0ylsdh foreign key (user_id) references users 2026-05-26T12:57:57.737+03:00 INFO 31596 --- testcase.name: findOverdueByUserId_returnsOnlyOverdueNonDone
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.course_id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.description,t1_0.due_date,t1_0.priority,t1_0.recurrence_pattern,t1_0.recurring,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.due_date<? and t1_0.status<>'DONE'

testcase.name: findByIdAndUserId_wrongUser_returnsEmpty
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.course_id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.description,t1_0.due_date,t1_0.priority,t1_0.recurrence_pattern,t1_0.recurring,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 left join users u1_0 on u1_0.id=t1_0.user_id where t1_0.id=? and u1_0.id=?

testcase.name: findDueTodayByUserId_returnsOnlyTodayNonDone
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select t1_0.id,t1_0.course_id,t1_0.created_at,t1_0.description,t1_0.due_date,t1_0.priority,t1_0.recurrence_pattern,t1_0.recurring,t1_0.status,t1_0.title,t1_0.updated_at,t1_0.user_id from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=? and t1_0.due_date=? and t1_0.status<>'DONE'

testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only

testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select u1_0.id from users u1_0 where u1_0.email=? fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: findByUserIdOrderByCreatedAtDesc_returnsCourses
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into courses (category,color,created_at,credits,description,instructor,name,status,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into courses (category,color,created_at,credits,description,instructor,name,status,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select c1_0.id,c1_0.category,c1_0.color,c1_0.created_at,c1_0.credits,c1_0.description,c1_0.instructor,c1_0.name,c1_0.status,c1_0.user_id from courses c1_0 left join users u1_0 on u1_0.id=c1_0.user_id where u1_0.id=? order by c1_0.created_at desc

testcase.name: existsByUserIdAndBadgeType_false
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select a1_0.id from achievements a1_0 left join users u1_0 on u1_0.id=a1_0.user_id where u1_0.id=? and a1_0.badge_type=? fetch first ? rows only

testcase.name: countAllByUserId_countsCorrectly
testcase.system-out: Hibernate: insert into users (avatar_url,created_at,email,first_name,last_name,password_hash,role,updated_at,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: insert into tasks (course_id,created_at,description,due_date,priority,recurrence_pattern,recurring,status,title,updated_at,user_id,id) values (?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,?,default) Hibernate: select count(t1_0.id) from tasks t1_0 where t1_0.user_id=?
